name: @umituz/web-polar-payment
description: Universal Polar.sh subscription billing — Firebase adapter

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --clean --external firebase --external firebase/functions --external firebase/firestore
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch --external firebase --external firebase/functions --external firebase/firestore

author: Antigravity
